name: Moldova
summary: Region known for lyrical songs, painted monasteries, and ritual hospitality.

games.name: Braulete
games.description: Quick partner dance accompanied by violin and cobza.

costumes.name: Ia cu batic ceremonial
costumes.description: Hand-stitched blouse worn with decorative ceremonial headscarf.

traditions.name: Colinde de ceata
traditions.description: Organized caroling groups moving house to house at winter holidays.

images.alt: Stylized Moldova folk pattern in blue and red
